publishedAbstract: To use a Windows AD (or FreeIPA), you need to modify the sssd configuration file to point to the Windows AD server and provide the credentials to connect to the LDAP server. Set a configMap with the `sssd.conf` file and use the configmap to provide the CA certificate file required for the configMap setup.
publishedTitle: Setting up Ceph NFS-Ganesha and using a Windows AD for user ID lookups
